sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n78567" key="paraph/xion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παραπήχιον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n78567.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">radius</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">small bone of the forearm</tr_>, opp. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">προπήχιον</foreign> (<tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">ulna</tr_>), <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:2:142" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.142</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
